archive.desc_archive: Archive this organization — it will be removed from active lists but can be restored later.
archive.desc_restore: This organization is archived and hidden from active lists. You can restore it to make it active again.

archive.dialog_desc_restore: Restore this organization and make it active again. Content and settings are preserved.
archive.error: Failed to update organization. Please try again later.

actions.delete_warning: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete.

actions.demo_error_update: This feature is not available in demo mode.

actions.success_update: The member's role has been updated successfully.

sandbox.title: Vercel Sandbox
sandbox.description: Connect a Vercel access token to enable live sandbox previews for your projects.
sandbox.step1: Create a Vercel access token with full account scope.
sandbox.step2: Paste it below and click Connect.
sandbox.step3: A dedicated sandbox project will be created automatically on your Vercel account.
sandbox.disconnect_confirm_desc: Sandbox previews will stop working for all projects in this organization.
sandbox.toast_connect_success_desc: Sandbox previews will now run on {username}'s Vercel account.
sandbox.no_permission: Only org owners and admins can manage sandbox settings.
sandbox.security0: Preview Sandbox runs your project’s **`dev` script** (e.g. `npm run dev`). If your site does not start with that script, it will not run in the sandbox either.
sandbox.security1: Your access token is **encrypted with AES-256-GCM** before storage — never saved in plain text.
sandbox.security2: **Any Vercel account works** — personal or team, free Hobby plan or paid. Sandbox previews run on your own Vercel quota, not ours.
sandbox.security3: The token is used **only** to create a dedicated sandbox project and manage preview deployments. No other actions are taken on your Vercel account.
sandbox.security4: **Disconnect at any time** to immediately wipe the token from our servers.
sandbox.security5: Each organization gets its own **dedicated sandbox project** on Vercel — keeping previews isolated per org and billing attribution clean.

org-archived.title: Organization Archived
org-archived.desc_full: This organization has been archived. All content is currently read-only, and most management functions are disabled.
org-archived.desc_banner: This organization is currently archived and most functionality is disabled.
